mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_draft(draft_id, user_id, draft_content, media_ids, device_id, client_version, update_time) VALUES(#{draftId}, #{userId}, #{draftContent}, #{mediaIds}, #{deviceId}, #{clientVersion}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draft_content = VALUES(draft_content), media_ids = VALUES(media_ids), device_id = VALUES(device_id), client_version = VALUES(client_version), update_time = NOW()
